ACO's certified participant list used in third quarter assignment NUM 1 Tracks 1 and 2 Q2 = 12 months prior to the end of Q3 of reference year - i.e. 10/1/20xx - 9/30/20xx; Track 3 Q1 through Q3 current reference year - i.e. 1/1/20yy - 6/30/20yy x x x x x x x x x x x
Q4_ASSIGN Assigned in Quarter 4 (Boolean) 0/1 flag; =1 if beneficiary was assigned in fourth quarter (from quarterly assignment table in IDR) based on the ACO's certified participant list used in fourth quarter assignment NUM 1 All
